gaps.what_missing: - Public projects and case studies (e.g., NREL, TSOs, universities) - Technical reports on AI applications in grid management - Standards for smart grid technologies  ---  ### Summary of Key Gaps | **Gap** | **Impact** | **Priority** | |---------|------------|--------------| | IEF Data Inaccessibility | Hinders global policy coordination | High | | Energy Poverty Indicators | Limits socio-economic analysis | High | | Storage System Data | Impedes renewable integration | High | | Metadata Fragmentation | Complicates data integration | Medium | | Unstable Data Sources | Risks data loss | High | | Grid Stability KPIs | No standardized metrics | High | | Investment Data | Poor correlation with grid stress | Medium | | Public Dashboard | Limited transparency | Medium | | Temporal Resolution Mismatch | Flawed trend analysis | Medium | | AI/Algorithm Usage Data | No benchmarking | Medium |  This structured list highlights critical data gaps that must be addressed to improve energy system analysis, policy-making, and infrastructure planning.
gaps.why_important: - Public projects and case studies (e.g., NREL, TSOs, universities) - Technical reports on AI applications in grid management - Standards for smart grid technologies  ---  ### Summary of Key Gaps | **Gap** | **Impact** | **Priority** | |---------|------------|--------------| | IEF Data Inaccessibility | Hinders global policy coordination | High | | Energy Poverty Indicators | Limits socio-economic analysis | High | | Storage System Data | Impedes renewable integration | High | | Metadata Fragmentation | Complicates data integration | Medium | | Unstable Data Sources | Risks data loss | High | | Grid Stability KPIs | No standardized metrics | High | | Investment Data | Poor correlation with grid stress | Medium | | Public Dashboard | Limited transparency | Medium | | Temporal Resolution Mismatch | Flawed trend analysis | Medium | | AI/Algorithm Usage Data | No benchmarking | Medium |  This structured list highlights critical data gaps that must be addressed to improve energy system analysis, policy-making, and infrastructure planning.
gaps.notes: Lack of AI/Algorithm Usage Data in Grid Management
